title: The Frontiersmen
writer: Norman Houston, Harrison Jacobs, Clarence E. Mulford
actors: William Boyd, George 'Gabby' Hayes, Russell Hayden
plot: A pretty and gentle schoolteacher from Boston transforms the lives of a spoiled boy and the other residents at 'Bar 20' Ranch, and is courted by Crockett city's Mayor, who is really a livestock thief.
